name: Hortosoupa (Vegetable Soup)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds Ripe tomatoes (approx.) OR 1 can Whole tomatoes (30 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash, clean, and chop the potatoes, onions, carrots, and celery.
2. Add them to a pot with water and bring to a boil for 20 minutes.
3. If using ripe tomatoes, pierce them with a fork and add to the pot. Cook for an additional 30 to 45 minutes.
4. Remove from heat. Pass all vegetables through a strainer or puree machine, then return to the pot.
5. Add a little pepper and stir in the shortening or serve the soup with oil at the table.
6. Serve with croutons.
